defaults.hook_cover_term: Kylian Mbappe sprinting at full speed with the ball during a football match

videos.video_subject: How Kylian Mbappe is so fast that his top sprint speed in a football match rivals Usain Bolt - the speed records and solo goals that prove it
videos.video_script: This man might be faster than Usain Bolt. In a match, Mbappe was clocked at thirty eight kilometres an hour, quicker than Bolt's average over a hundred metres. He once ran almost the full pitch to score in a World Cup. Defenders don't even chase him anymore, they just watch him disappear. And he does all of it in football boots, not spikes. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Kylian Mbappe sprinting at full speed, Mbappe outrunning defenders on the pitch, Mbappe solo goal long run, Mbappe France national team celebration, Mbappe Real Madrid jersey running, Mbappe scoring a goal close up, Mbappe intense face during a match, Mbappe dribbling at high speed, Mbappe celebrating a goal, Mbappe accelerating past a defender
